steps.title: Set up
steps.content: In a right triangle, $\sin\theta = \dfrac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}$. The side opposite $y°$ is 5 and the hypotenuse is 26.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice A, $\frac{5}{26}$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A is correct.
